selected_important_turn.text: I agree. I have diabetes, so water and food are super important to me. My diabetes makes me super thirsty and I have to make sure I keep my blood sugar under control with certain foods ☹️
selected_important_turn.why_important: This turn is the key factual disclosure that justifies prioritizing water and food for YOU. It shapes all subsequent offers and concessions by providing the opponent a clear reason to yield water.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: While the personal disclosure builds rapport and explains needs, it is vague about concrete requirements (how much water/food is minimally necessary, timing, or tradeoff flexibility). Without specifics, the opponent must guess the scale of the need, which can produce suboptimal tradeoffs or missed integrative splits.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Keep the empathetic disclosure but add concrete, negotiable constraints or thresholds (e.g., minimum daily water/food units you need, which foods are essential, what you could trade away). Frame the detail as helping the partner propose fair trades (willingness to accept more of X in exchange for Y).

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: Likely increase — more precise needs enable tailored, efficient trades that create value for both sides.
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: Increase — specificity helps ensure the allocation matches real needs rather than vague assumptions.
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: Increase — clearer constraints lower back-and-forth and speed convergence on mutually acceptable splits.
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: Slight increase — still cooperative disclosure but more practical; preserves empathy while enabling problem-solving.

value2reason.Low: You're never out of potential firewood in a forest
value2reason.Medium: Water can be found in the wild and purified
value2reason.High: Food is very important and harder to forage for in the wild if you run out.

value2reason.Low: I was able to already get some firewood from the campground. I don't really need much more!
value2reason.Medium: Again, with the diabetes, I need to make sure I keep my blood sugar level stable with food!
value2reason.High: I have diabetes which tends to make me more thirsty.

dialogue.text: Hello! I'm so excited for this camping trip. What do you still need as your supplies?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I think food, water, and firewood are all going to be fairly important.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I agree. I have diabetes, so water and food are super important to me. My diabetes makes me super thirsty and I have to make sure I keep my blood sugar under control with certain foods ☹️
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I have diabetes, so I need at least 2 water packages and 1 food package to stay stable. I’m willing to trade firewood for extra water or food if needed. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand your need for water and food. Since I value food most, I’m willing to offer 2 food packages and 1 water package in exchange for 3 firewood packages. This way, you get your essentials, and I secure high-value food while balancing the rest.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need at least 2 water and 1 food to manage my diabetes. If you give me 2 water and 1 food, I’ll give you 2 firewood. If you want more, I can trade 1 firewood for 1 water or food. What works for you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm happy to adjust. If you take 2 water and 1 food, I’ll take 2 firewood. That meets your diabetes needs and gives me 5 points for food. Let’s confirm this split.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need at least 2 water and 1 food to manage my diabetes. If you give me 2 water and 1 food, I’ll give you 2 firewood. If you want more, I can trade 1 firewood for 1 water or food. What works for you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I agree to the split: you take 2 water and 1 food, and I take 2 firewood. This meets your diabetes needs and aligns with my priorities. Let’s confirm and then I’ll leave.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Deal confirmed: I take 2 water and 1 food, you take 2 firewood. Let’s finalize and I’ll leave.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
